nodes.name: 皮奧伊州
nodes.summary: 皮奧伊州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联21种鸟类，包括黄腿穴䳍、Buff-browed chachalaca、Pygmy nightjar等21种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Rufous casiornis
nodes.summary: Rufous casiornis（Rufous casiornis，学名 Casiornis rufus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联19个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 玻利維亞

nodes.name: LC

nodes.name: 科连特斯省
nodes.summary: 科连特斯省（Corrientes）為南美國家阿根廷二十三省之一，位於阿根廷东北部，首府為科连特斯（Corrientes）。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The rufous casiornis (Casiornis rufus) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Paraguay, Peru, Uruguay, and as a vagrant to Chile.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The rufous casiornis is found from southeastern Peru south through much of Bolivia and Paraguay, into northern Argentina as far as Tucumán and Corrientes provinces, and slightly into northern Uruguay. Its range extends east into Brazil with the boundary roughly formed by central Rondônia, central Pará, western Piauí, southern Minas Gerais, and southern Mato Grosso do Sul. It has also occurred as a vagrant in Chile. The rufous casiornis inhabits a variety of wooded landscapes including deciduous woodlands, gallery woodlands, wooded cerrado, and scrubby and wooded Chaco. It has been reported in dry forest in parts of Peru.{{cite book | last =Schulenberg | first =T.S
